title: aspidium contractum
intro: Aspidium contractum, also known as contracted spleenwort, is a species of fern native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Aspidium contractum include its ability to aid in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of Aspidium contractum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and topical creams for various health benefits.
